summary: P4 Playwright integration testing completed successfully. All core functionality verified: imports work, registry helpers return correct sources (4 server-rendered + 1 JS-rendered), proxy parser works correctly, Playwright subprocess runs without raising exceptions, dual-backend integration (Scrapy + Playwright) runs in parallel via asyncio.gather, fail-soft behavior works as expected when Cloudflare blocks scores24.live, and all regression tests pass.

notes: scores24.live is blocked by Cloudflare (expected behavior with datacenter IPs) - returns empty list without raising exceptions
Backend logs confirm both [SCRAPY_EDITORIAL_START] and [PLAYWRIGHT_EDITORIAL_START] markers appear when running fetch_editorial_context_bulk
Playwright subprocess logs [PLAYWRIGHT_EDITORIAL_START], [PLAYWRIGHT_EDITORIAL_BLOCKED], and [PLAYWRIGHT_EDITORIAL_DONE] markers correctly
Frontend testing not required for this backend-only P4 integration

passed_tests: Import statements work: enabled_sources, server_rendered_sources, js_rendered_sources, fetch_editorial_context_bulk
server_rendered_sources('football') returns 4 entries: {as_com, sportytrader_es, besoccer_es, marca_com}
enabled_sources('football') returns 5 entries with include_js=True, 4 entries with include_js=False
Proxy parser returns None when PLAYWRIGHT_PROXY env var not set
Proxy parser correctly parses PLAYWRIGHT_PROXY='http://user:pass@host:port' into {server, username, password}
Playwright subprocess runs cleanly with synthetic match, returns empty list (Cloudflare blocks), does NOT raise exceptions
Dual-backend integration: fetch_editorial_context_bulk runs BOTH Scrapy and Playwright in parallel via asyncio.gather
Fail-soft behavior: Playwright returns 0 items (Cloudflare blocks scores24.live) but system continues without raising
Regression: Auth login with demo@valuebet.app works

additional_notes.playwright_chromium_installation: Playwright chromium browser is installed at /pw-browsers (PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH env var set automatically by subprocess)
additional_notes.cloudflare_blocking: scores24.live is blocked by Cloudflare Bot Fight Mode (datacenter IP) - this is EXPECTED behavior. To enable scores24.live in production, set PLAYWRIGHT_PROXY env var to a residential proxy
additional_notes.parallel_execution_confirmed: Backend logs show both Scrapy and Playwright start at nearly the same timestamp (05:01:06.963 and 05:01:06.964), confirming parallel execution via asyncio.gather
additional_notes.fail_soft_verified: System never raises exceptions even when Playwright returns 0 items - returns available=False with _reason='no_signals'
additional_notes.p3_functionality_intact: All P3 functionality remains intact - Scrapy backend continues to work for server-rendered sources (as_com, sportytrader_es, besoccer_es, marca_com)
